title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model that trains on video, audio, text, and action data to enable robots to understand and predict physical environments. This is part of NVIDIA's broader physical AI stack alongside Vera and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot.
